title: senecio huaquilicus
intro: Senecio huaquilicus, also known as Huaquilicus ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine in South America, particularly in Peru and Bolivia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Senecio huaquilicus can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
